portfolioItems.title: Rajin Company Internal ERP
portfolioItems.description: Sistem ERP komprehensif untuk mengelola operasional bisnis franchise secara real-time.
portfolioItems.description_en: Comprehensive ERP system to manage franchise business operations in real-time.
portfolioItems.challenge: Menghilangkan silo informasi antar 10 divisi perusahaan dan mengintegrasikan seluruh rantai nilai bisnis.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Eliminating information silos between 10 company divisions and integrating the entire business value chain.
portfolioItems.solution: Membangun hub pusat berbasis Next.js 15 dan Firebase dengan dasbor khusus setiap divisi.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Built a central hub based on Next.js 15 and Firebase with division-specific dashboards.

portfolioItems.title: Internal QC System (AI-Powered)
portfolioItems.description: Platform manajemen kontrol kualitas dengan analisis AI untuk audit operasional multi-outlet.
portfolioItems.description_en: AI-powered quality control management platform for multi-outlet operational audits.
portfolioItems.challenge: Merampingkan alur kerja audit operasional pada jaringan outlet yang luas menggunakan AI.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Streamlining operational audit workflows across extensive outlet networks using AI.
portfolioItems.solution: Sistem berbasis Next.js 15 dengan integrasi Genkit (Google Gemini) untuk analisis defisiensi otomatis.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Next.js 15 based system with Genkit (Google Gemini) integration for automated deficiency analysis.

portfolioItems.title: Franchise Management & CRM System
portfolioItems.description: Sistem manajemen terpusat sebagai jembatan operasional antara Kantor Pusat (HQ) dan Mitra.
portfolioItems.description_en: Centralized management system serving as an operational bridge between HQ and Partners.
portfolioItems.challenge: Menjaga standarisasi operasional dan memantau performa inventaris aset kritis di jaringan mitra.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Maintaining operational standardization and monitoring critical asset inventory across the partner network.
portfolioItems.solution: Platform terpadu dengan Dashboard Analytics, Asset Tracking, dan Helpdesk Ticketing System.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Unified platform with Dashboard Analytics, Asset Tracking, and Helpdesk Ticketing System.

portfolioItems.title: AutoMeet - Booking & Queue System
portfolioItems.description: Aplikasi mobile otomatisasi booking jadwal dan manajemen antrean pelanggan terintegrasi video call.
portfolioItems.description_en: Mobile application automating schedule booking and customer queue management with video call integration.
portfolioItems.challenge: Menghilangkan inefisiensi koordinasi jadwal manual dan memberikan transparansi ketersediaan CS.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Eliminating manual schedule coordination inefficiencies and providing CS availability transparency.
portfolioItems.solution: Aplikasi mobile lintas platform menggunakan React Native & Expo dengan integrasi Jitsi Meet dan WhatsApp API.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Cross-platform mobile app using React Native & Expo with Jitsi Meet and WhatsApp API integration.

portfolioItems.title: OpsFix Tracker Platform
portfolioItems.description: Platform manajemen kendala operasional real-time untuk koordinasi staf dan tim teknis.
portfolioItems.description_en: Real-time operational issue management platform for staff and technical team coordination.
portfolioItems.challenge: Mendigitalisasi pelaporan manual dan meningkatkan akuntabilitas melalui Live Action Tracking.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Digitalizing manual reporting and increasing accountability through Live Action Tracking.
portfolioItems.solution: Sistem pelacakan live dengan React 19 dan Supabase (PostgreSQL) serta login PIN 4-digit.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Live tracking system with React 19 and Supabase (PostgreSQL) plus 4-digit PIN login.

portfolioItems.title: Kasirin POS
portfolioItems.description: Aplikasi Point of Sale (POS) modern lintas platform untuk percepatan transaksi ritel dan F&B.
portfolioItems.description_en: Modern cross-platform Point of Sale (POS) application for retail and F&B transaction speed.
portfolioItems.challenge: Menciptakan pengalaman kasir yang cepat dan responsif di berbagai perangkat dari satu basis kode.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Creating a fast and responsive cashier experience across devices from a single codebase.
portfolioItems.solution: Aplikasi modern dengan performa native lintas platform menggunakan Flutter.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Modern application with cross-platform native performance using Flutter.

portfolioItems.title: Ngabuburit Fun Meet
portfolioItems.description: Platform sosial berbasis web untuk perencanaan bukber secara anonim dan real-time.
portfolioItems.description_en: Web-based social platform for anonymous and real-time 'bukber' (breaking fast together) planning.
portfolioItems.challenge: Memfasilitasi koordinasi sosial yang sensitif privasi tanpa pendaftaran dan moderasi AI.
portfolioItems.challenge_en: Facilitating privacy-sensitive social coordination without registration and with AI moderation.
portfolioItems.solution: Implementasi 'Ghost Mode' menggunakan Firebase Anonymous Auth dan moderasi konten berbasis AI.
portfolioItems.solution_en: Implementation of 'Ghost Mode' using Firebase Anonymous Auth and AI-based content moderation.
